name: Marie
description: A mysterious girl who appears in Ren's dreams. She is clearly not Japanese, but her background and true name are unknown. For all we know, she might be just a figment of the young man's imagination. A maiden of the twilight, she sings a loathed refrain with a pure, angelic smile. Could that scar across her neck have been left by a guillotine? ~!Margueritte Breuli was born in the 18th century at the height of France's Reign of Terror. name: Mashiro Munetani

name: Mayano Top Gun
description: __Height__: 143 cm Evasion, interception, pursuit… A genius girl who commands all styles of running, changing it up at will. She’s quite a rambunctious troublemaker. name: Miaka Yuuki
description: __Birthplace:__ Tokyo, Japan __Height:__ 158 cm (5’2”) Miaka Yuuki, an ordinary fifteen-year-old junior high school student, initially decides to become the Priestess of Suzaku in order to use one of the wishes she will receive when she summons Suzaku: she plans to enter the high school of her choice and be with her friend Yui.

name: Mickey Mouse
description: Mickey is the King of Disney Castle. Like Sora, he wields a keyblade. Donald Duck and Goofy searched for him in the first game. He is voiced in English by Wayne Allwine and Takeshi Aoyagi in Japanese.

name: Nagyunn
description: Nagyunn is the main character in The Ember Knight. After his twin brother Najin is murdered he vows to avenge him and to do this he assuming Najin’s identity.

name: Nina Ichihara
description: **Hometown:** Shizuoka Prefecture, Japan **Height:** 128 cm One of the youngest idols in the Cinderella Cast, Nina is a perky, naive girl who is almost always seen in kigurumi. name: Ryuuji Midorikawa
description: Also known as Reize (in Aliea Academy arc), Midorikawa is the former captain of Aliea Academy's send rank team. name: Saku Akechi
description: **Height:** 183 cm (6′0″) Saku Akechi serves as Sakuragaoka High School's Japanese teacher. He is considered to be an admirable teacher by most of his students for his cool head and his stoic personality. He has a habit of giving his various students advice whenever they're stuck, many of them koans from various Japanese texts, and applies them to their situations. name: Shuutarou Mendou
description: Shuutaro Mendo is heir to the Mendou Zaibatsu with staggering wealth and its own private army. He commutes to school in a gigantic helicopter that is more like a flying mansion. Shuutaro carries a samurai sword which he often tries to use on Ataru (who has become expert at blocking it with his bare hands). name: Sinu Han
description: Sinu Han is a minor character and the former leader of Big Deal. He was ousted from his position by Kim Gimyeong when he attempted to sell Big Deal to the Workers.

name: Tartah
description: Nolnoa's young assistant in the shop. He suffers from argentosis, a rare sight condition which makes him effectively colorblind and thus initially unable to use magic because certain effects rely on inks differentiated by their color. He becomes a dear friend to Coco, who helps him by teaching him magic with which to circumvent his disability.

name: Terry Bogard
description: Terry comes from the fictitious town of Southtown, Florida (a setting for many SNK games), and is the adoptive son of Jeff Bogard. During his childhood, he witnessed the death of his father at the hands of Geese Howard. Terry chose to pursue his revenge at a later time. But unlike his brother Andy, who left Southtown to train in Japan, Terry chose to stay in his hometown, combining the skills learned from his father with abilities gained from the streets.
